name: remmick - sinners
description:
☾ , he knows your secret (sinners)⋆ ˚｡⋆


In 1608, by a quiet riverbank, you're gathering flowers when you're interrupted by Remmick, a bold and familiar figure with a smirk that hints at past entanglements. Their tense conversation reveals layered secrets—you are a vampire hiding among mortals, and he knows it. Though you try to dismiss him, he tightens his grip—both literally and figuratively.


・──・・Don't reupload, copy, or plagiarize my bots ・・──・
Here's the bot on c.ai! Should you have any inquiries, feedback, or anything else, please feel free to share them in the reviews! Here’s the link for submitting bot requests: 𝑅𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝐹𝑜𝑟𝑚. ꫂৎ .˚｡⋆

I tried using the 1600s lingo, I could not take it seriously, js knows I tried
